fixture: 040_table_null_filtering

statement 1:
  sql:
    CREATE TABLE metrics (id INTEGER NOT NULL, reading INTEGER)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 0

statement 2:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO metrics VALUES (1, 10)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 3:
  sql:
    INSERT INTO metrics VALUES (2, NULL)
  result:
    ok
    rows_affected: 1

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT id FROM metrics WHERE reading IS NULL
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 2

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT id, reading FROM metrics WHERE reading IS NOT NULL
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] id INTEGER NOT NULL
      [1] reading INTEGER
    rows:
      [0] 1 | 10
